name: Dota 2
description: Every day, millions of players worldwide enter battle as one of over a hundred Dota heroes. And no matter if it's their 10th hour of play or 1,000th, there's always something new to discover. With regular updates that ensure a constant evolution of gameplay, features, and heroes, Dota 2 has taken on a life of its own.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 or newer
  • Processor: Dual core from Intel or AMD at 2.8 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8600/9600GT, ATI/AMD Radeon HD2600/3600
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 60 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible
comment1: Came back after a long hiatus. Still the same old toxic community.
comment2:
I seriously suck at this game. When it comes to PvP, the adrenaline hits me, I freeze, forget to use the keys and become a total mess. I've played a lot of bots in normal mode with others until......Arcade.

Bruuuuuuuuuh. Waste some time. Play these community made map modes. It's how DOTA started and honestly what it's all about.
comment3: It's fun. Just ignore the toxicity; internet randos are not worth your emotional energy.
